content: The Tiffin Schedule allows you to plan your meals (Breakfast, Lunch, Snack, Dinner) for the upcoming weeks. You can assign different caterers to different slots or select 'None / Going Out' if you don't need a meal for a specific slot. Past weeks are automatically hidden.
Veg Mode is a global toggle available in the navigation bar. When turned on, the platform only shows 100% vegetarian caterers and hides any non-veg options to ensure a purely vegetarian experience.
You can cancel any scheduled tiffin up to 12 hours before the delivery time for a full refund to your wallet. Cancellations within 12 hours of delivery are not eligible for a refund.

Delivery timings depend on the meal slot. Breakfast is delivered between 7:00 AM - 9:00 AM. Lunch is delivered between 12:00 PM - 2:00 PM. Snacks are delivered between 5:00 PM - 7:00 PM. Dinner is delivered between 8:00 PM - 10:00 PM.

CaterBridge uses an internal wallet system. You must recharge your wallet using a credit or debit card. Meal costs are automatically deducted from your wallet balance when a caterer accepts your schedule. We accept Visa, MasterCard, and Amex via Stripe.
You can subscribe to a specific caterer for an entire week or month at a discounted rate. Subscription payments are processed upfront from your wallet balance.

All caterers on CaterBridge undergo strict hygiene checks and hold valid FSSAI licenses. If you receive poor quality food, please report it within 2 hours of delivery with photos for a full refund and investigation.
If you have a critical issue that this bot cannot resolve, please reach out to our human support team at support@caterbridge.com or call our toll-free number 1800-123-4567 between 9 AM and 9 PM.
